name: ConfidenceBench: Evaluating Confidence Calibration in Large Language Models

description: arXiv:2607.20526v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in settings where fluent but incorrect answers can be costly. In these settings, accuracy alone is insufficient: models must also know when they are likely to be wrong. We present ConfidenceBench, a calibration benchmark that evaluates verbalized confidence estimates in 15 frontier LLMs using...
author: Matthew ffrench-Constant, Daniel Yang, Xinmeng Huang, Sanyam Kapoor
